Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Twin Star Sect]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — The Twin Star Sect has a headquarters on the edge of Serpent’s Grave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — The Twin Star Sect is a group Yerin asks about.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — The Twin Star Sect has two-colored star banners around the city.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 8''' — The Twin Star Sect has light blue robes with orange and red highlights.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — Members of the Twin Star Sect practiced light or dream Paths.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — The fight is occurring in the Twin Star Sect compound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon relocated the Twin Star Sect.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 5''' — The Twin Star Sect flies the two-colored star.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — The Hall has been working with the Twin Star Sect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Some people are calling the Twin Star Sect a Dreadgod cult.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — Some students in the Twin Star Sect spread legends about Jai Chen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — The Twin Star Sect flags fly over Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — The Twin Star Sect's symbol is a split star.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — The Twin Star Sect gathered in Lindon's name because people wanted to borrow the protection of the Void Sage.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — The Twin Star Sect uses blue-and-orange banners.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
